title: chrysanthemum brachyanthum
intro: Chrysanthemum brachyanthum, also known as the Korean chrysanthemum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum brachyanthum include relieving fever, headaches, and sore throats, as well as supporting digestive health and reducing stress. Chrysanthemum brachyanthum is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
